member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Contracts.Jwtoken.IJwtUserTokenManager`1
member.summary: Defines operations for generating, validating, and revoking JWT tokens.
member.typeparam: The type of the user identifier.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Contracts.Jwtoken.IJwtUserTokenManager`1.RevokeAccessTokenAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Revokes a specific access token by its JTI.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Contracts.Jwtoken.IJwtUserTokenManager`1.IsAccessTokenRevokedAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks whether the specified access token has been revoked.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Contracts.Jwtoken.IJwtUserTokenManager`1.IsRefreshTokenRevokedAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks whether the specified refresh token has been revoked.

member.summary: Defines operations for generating, validating, and revoking JWT tokens.

member.summary: Checks whether the specified access token has been revoked.

member.summary: Checks whether the specified refresh token has been revoked.

member.name: T:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Contracts.JwtToken.IRefreshTokenStore`1
member.summary: Defines operations for storing and managing refresh tokens.
member.typeparam: The type of the user's unique identifier.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Contracts.JwtToken.IRefreshTokenStore`1.SaveAsync(StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken{`0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.param: A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

member.name: M:StruttonTechnologies.Core.Identity.Domain.Contracts.JwtToken.IRefreshTokenStore`1.GetAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Retrieves a refresh token by its token string asynchronously.
member.param: The token string to search for.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

member.summary: Revokes a refresh token by its token string asynchronously.
member.param: A token to monitor for cancellation requests.

member.summary: Revokes all refresh tokens associated with the specified user.
member.param: The unique identifier of the user.
A token to monitor for cancellation requests.
